emails.subject: Enron assets
emails.body: Enron assets I was reading something on how we will be the biggest bankruptcy ever and have a great degree of comfort about our reorg. Apparently, our debt is only in the neighborhood of $16 billion and as of September, our books had our assets valued at nearly $61 billion

emails.subject: RE: Enron assets
emails.body: RE: Enron assets So how come no one will buy for $5b? To: Mann, Kay

emails.subject: RE: Enron assets
emails.body: I just couldn't help myself. To: Mann, Kay
